message.content:
You are repairing an AsciiDoc procedural sub-spec to align it with sibling files for cross-spec consistency. Pure .adoc work, no code, no commits.

TARGET FILE:
/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSDR-director_roster.adoc

FOUR REPAIRS TO LAND IN THIS FILE:

REPAIR A — Convert prose-style opener to NOTE: block (matching RBSDE-depot_levy.adoc:4-13 gold standard, using the defined plural attribute `{giam_service_account_s}` for "Service Accounts" plural).

CURRENT lines 4-12:
```
The
{rbtr_governor}
lists all
{rbtr_director}
{giam_service_account}
instances within the
{rbtgi_depot_project},
emitting a presence fact per discovered account.
This is a read-only observation operation; no SA credentials are created or modified.
```

REPLACE WITH (verbatim — do not rephrase):
```
NOTE: This operation rosters {rbtr_director} {giam_service_account_s} in the {rbtgi_depot_project} via per-SA fact-file emission.
Read-only observation: lists all SAs, filters to director-prefixed accountIds, and emits one fact per discovered SA via {buf_write_fact_multi} against the `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director` extension constant.
Fact content is empty (presence-as-fact); stdout assertion of individual identities is retired.
```

REPAIR B — Drop the empty-result early-exit branch (non-load-bearing scaffolding; presence-as-fact convention naturally degrades to zero emissions, and the final "Report count" step displays the count).

CURRENT (in step 3 "Filter to director service accounts"):
```
.. {rbbc_store}
`«DIRECTOR_ACCOUNTS»` — the filtered set
.. If `«DIRECTOR_ACCOUNTS»` is empty:
... {rbbc_show}
"No director service accounts found in project"
... Return success
```

REPLACE WITH (drop the empty-result branch):
```
.. {rbbc_store}
`«DIRECTOR_ACCOUNTS»` — the filtered set; per-role observation per BBAAQ contract
```

REPAIR C — Repair the {buf_write_fact_multi} call description to be explicit about the three positional arguments and the empty-content invariant.

CURRENT (in step 4 "Emit per-account fact files"):
```
//axhos_step
. *Emit per-account fact files*:
.. For each entry in `«DIRECTOR_ACCOUNTS»`:
... {rbbc_store}
`«IDENTITY»` by stripping the `${RBCC_role_director}-` prefix from the entry's `.accountId`
... {rbbc_call}
{buf_write_fact_multi} with file root, extension constant `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director`
(expands to `roster-director`), and basename `«IDENTITY»`
... Fact content is empty — presence of the fact file is the datum (presence-as-fact convention)
```

REPLACE WITH:
```
//axhos_step
. *Emit Fact Per Discovered {rbtr_director}*:
.. For each entry in `«DIRECTOR_ACCOUNTS»`:
... {rbbc_store}
`«IDENTITY»` by stripping the `${RBCC_role_director}-` prefix from the entry's `accountId`
... {rbbc_call}
{buf_write_fact_multi}
with three positional arguments:
.... `<file_root>`: composed as `<roster_subdir>/«IDENTITY»` (the basename root for the emitted fact file)
.... `<ext>`: `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director` (resolves at source time to `roster-director`)
.... `<value>`: `""` (empty content — presence-as-fact convention per RBS0:1081)
```

REPAIR D — Replace `//axhoc_completion` prose with parallel template (matches what RBSRL is being updated to).

CURRENT lines 59-62:
```
//axhoc_completion
Successful execution rosters
{rbtr_director}
service accounts via per-SA fact emission, one `roster-director` fact file per discovered director identity.
```

REPLACE WITH (verbatim):
```
//axhoc_completion
Successful execution rosters {rbtr_director} service accounts via per-SA fact emission — one `roster-director` fact file per discovered identity.
The operation is read-only; no service accounts are created or modified.
```

CONSTRAINTS:
- Do NOT touch any other files. Do NOT make any commits.
- Preserve step 1 (Authenticate) and step 2 (List service accounts) unchanged.
- The "Report count" step at the end (step 5) remains as-is.

After editing, report in 5 lines max:
1. Final line count
2. Confirmation: opener is now a NOTE: block, uses `{giam_service_account_s}` (plural attribute)
3. Confirmation: zero "Return success" lines remain
4. Confirmation: //axhos_step heading is now "Emit Fact Per Discovered {rbtr_director}"
5. Any anomaly

content.text: Let me read the target file first.

content.content:
1	//axhob_operation
2	{rbtgo_director_roster}
3	
4	The
5	{rbtr_governor}
6	lists all
7	{rbtr_director}
8	{giam_service_account}
9	instances within the
10	{rbtgi_depot_project},
11	emitting a presence fact per discovered account.
12	This is a read-only observation operation; no SA credentials are created or modified.
13	
14	//axhos_step
15	. *Authenticate as
16	{rbtr_governor}*:
17	.. Execute
18	{rbtoe_governor_authenticate}
19	.. {rbbc_store}
20	`«GOVERNOR_TOKEN»` from the resulting access token
21	
22	//axhos_step
23	. *List service accounts*:
24	.. {rbbc_call}
25	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/list[iam.projects.serviceAccounts.list] with:
26	... method: `GET`
27	... endpoint: `https://iam.googleapis.com/v1/projects/{rbtgi_depot_project}/serviceAccounts`
28	... header: `Authorization: Bearer «GOVERNOR_TOKEN»`
29	.. {rbbc_require}
30	HTTP 200 response
31	.. {rbbc_store}
32	`«ACCOUNTS»` from response `.accounts[]` array
33	
34	//axhos_step
35	. *Filter to director service accounts*:
36	.. From `«ACCOUNTS»`, retain only entries whose `.accountId` begins with the `${RBCC_role_director}-` prefix
37	.. {rbbc_store}
38	`«DIRECTOR_ACCOUNTS»` — the filtered set
39	.. If `«DIRECTOR_ACCOUNTS»` is empty:
40	... {rbbc_show}
41	"No director service accounts found in project"
42	... Return success
43	
44	//axhos_step
45	. *Emit per-account fact files*:
46	.. For each entry in `«DIRECTOR_ACCOUNTS»`:
47	... {rbbc_store}
48	`«IDENTITY»` by stripping the `${RBCC_role_director}-` prefix from the entry's `.accountId`
49	... {rbbc_call}
50	{buf_write_fact_multi} with file root, extension constant `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director`
51	(expands to `roster-director`), and basename `«IDENTITY»`
52	... Fact content is empty — presence of the fact file is the datum (presence-as-fact convention)
53	
54	//axhos_step
55	. *Report count*:
56	.. {rbbc_show}
57	total count of emitted director fact files
58	
59	//axhoc_completion
60	Successful execution rosters
61	{rbtr_director}
62	service accounts via per-SA fact emission, one `roster-director` fact file per discovered director identity.
63

content.text: Now I'll apply all four repairs.
